author: jkraccoon
description: Render mid-fi web UI wireframes in notes from YAML (44 components, inline errors, typo hints) for ai co work(like claude code, codex ). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

releases.author: jkRaccoon
releases.description:
Layout/CSS fix release.

## Fixed
- **\`box-sizing: border-box\` on plugin elements.** A button or card with \`w: \"100%\"\` was overflowing its parent because the default \`box-sizing: content-box\` adds padding/border on top of the declared width. Scoped border-box to \`.uis-frame\` and descendants so widths behave predictably. Forms with full-width buttons in mobile viewports no longer bleed past the frame.

## Install
**BRAT:** BRAT → Add Beta plugin → \`jkRaccoon/obsidian-ui-sketch\`
**Manual:** copy \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, \`styles.css\` into \`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/ui-sketch/\`

releases.author: jkRaccoon
releases.description:
Bug fix release.

## Fixed
- **col with flex:0 no longer collapses to 0 width** ([#commits](../../commits/0.2.2)). Fixed-width sidebars (\`col{flex:0}\` with a \`sidebar{w:220}\` child) were rendering the sidebar items bleeding out of the flex container. Now uses \`flex: 0 0 auto\` so the col sizes to its content, while \`flex > 0\` keeps classic grow/shrink behavior.

## Meta
- Added GitHub Actions CI (\`typecheck\` + \`test\` + \`build\`, component-docs drift check, screenshot list drift check)
- gen-component-docs script now emits Korean tables for \`docs/ko/\` automatically

## Install
**BRAT:** BRAT → Add Beta plugin → \`jkRaccoon/obsidian-ui-sketch\`
**Manual:** copy \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, \`styles.css\` into \`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/ui-sketch/\`

releases.author: jkRaccoon
releases.description:
Community plugin readiness patch. No user-visible feature changes.

## Changes
- **Removed `innerHTML` from `renderEmptyPlaceholder`** in favor of DOM API, per Obsidian plugin guidelines.
- **Added justification comment** for the remaining sanitized `innerHTML` call in the ` raw: ` component — input is always piped through ` sanitize-html ` with a strict allow-list.
- **Added ` fundingUrl `** to ` manifest.json ` (GitHub Sponsors).
- **Added ` versions.json `** for per-version ` minAppVersion ` mapping.

## Install

**BRAT (recommended during beta):** BRAT → Add Beta plugin → ` jkRaccoon/obsidian-ui-sketch `

**Manual:** copy ` main.js `, ` manifest.json `, ` styles.css ` into ` <vault>/.obsidian/plugins/ui-sketch/ `.

releases.author: jkRaccoon
releases.description:
First public beta release.

## Highlights
- **44 components** across 8 categories (layout, navigation, basic input, advanced input, display, feedback, data, placeholder) + ` raw: ` HTML escape hatch
- **L3 inline errors** with Levenshtein-based typo suggestions — the rest of the wireframe still renders
- **Per-component zod schemas** for strict prop validation
- **Safety caps**: max depth 32, max nodes 5000 per block; ` raw: ` piped through ` sanitize-html `
- **Two layout models**: flex (row/col nesting) and named-area grid
- **Viewport presets**: desktop / tablet / mobile / custom
- **Theme adaptive**: inherits Obsidian CSS variables

## Install

**BRAT (recommended for beta):**
1. Install the BRAT community plugin
2. BRAT → Add Beta plugin → ` jkRaccoon/obsidian-ui-sketch `

**Manual:** copy ` main.js `, ` manifest.json `, ` styles.css ` into ` <vault>/.obsidian/plugins/ui-sketch/ ` and enable in Settings.

## Docs
- [README (English)](https://github.com/jkRaccoon/obsidian-ui-sketch#readme)
- [README (한국어)](https://github.com/jkRaccoon/obsidian-ui-sketch/blob/main/README.ko.md)
